title: kneiffia perennis
intro: Kneiffia perennis, also known as Wild Ginger, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Asclepiadaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues and soothe digestive problems. The health benefits of Kneiffia perennis include alleviating symptoms of coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
